sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73486" key="*(omhri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ὁμηρ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Com. feminine of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὅμηρος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.496d</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
